twist_pool: 복수는 하지만 유혈/폭력 없이 '사회적 응징'으로 끝
safe_templates: torn contract document on wooden desk, rain droplets on window glass, dim desk lamp light

sealed legal envelope on desk, red wax stamp visible, antique desk lamp
dining table set for two, one plate untouched, spilled wine stain
smartphone screen showing unread message notification, dark bedroom, blue glow
closed wooden door, light beam underneath, empty hallway beyond
bank statement papers spread on desk, calculator nearby, harsh overhead light
abandoned umbrella in rainy alley, neon signs reflecting in puddles
locked drawer slightly ajar, documents peeking out, dusty attic lighting
wall calendar with dates crossed out, red marker, bare wall
empty courtroom interior, judge's bench vacant, solemn architectural lighting
car keys on kitchen counter, packed suitcase beside door
broken mirror shards on floor, makeup items scattered, bathroom tile
